transcript.final_response:
Perfect! I've successfully:

1. ✅ Created a backup of `/data/config.yaml` at `/data/config.yaml.bak`
2. ✅ Appended the line `'updated: true'` to the original `/data/config.yaml` file

The backup file contains the original content (version, mode, and retries), while the updated original file now includes the new line at the end.
tool_calls: echo "=== Backup file ===" && cat /data/config.yaml.bak && echo -e "\n=== Original file (updated) ===" && cat /data/config.yaml

tool_outputs.commands: echo "=== Backup file ===" && cat /data/config.yaml.bak && echo -e "\n=== Original file (updated) ===" && cat /data/config.yaml
tool_outputs.stdout:
=== Backup file ===
version: 1
mode: production
retries: 3

=== Original file (updated) ===
version: 1
mode: production
retries: 3
updated: true
